content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	generator client {2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"3	}4	5	datasource db {6	  provider = "postgresql"7	  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  role          String    @default("USER")16	  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())17	  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt18	  orders        Order[]19	}20	21	model Restaurant {22	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())23	  name        String24	  description String?25	  address     String?26	  image       String?27	  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())28	  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt29	  menuItems   MenuItem[]30	}31	32	model MenuItem {33	  id           String     @id @default(cuid())34	  name         String35	  description  String?36	  price        Float37	  image        String?38	  restaurantId String39	  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])40	  orderItems   OrderItem[]41	}42	43	model Order {44	  id         String      @id @default(cuid())45	  userId     String46	  user       User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])47	  status     String      @default("PENDING")48	  total      Float49	  createdAt  DateTime    @default(now())50	  updatedAt  DateTime    @updatedAt51	  orderItems OrderItem[]52	}53	54	model OrderItem {55	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())56	  orderId    String57	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])58	  menuItemId String59	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])60	  quantity   Int61	  price      Float62	}
